mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN code_detail cd_cat ON cd_cat.code_value = cs.category_code AND cd_cat.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd_cat.status IS NULL OR cd_cat.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg_cat ON cg_cat.code_group_seq = cd_cat.code_group_seq AND cg_cat.code_group_id = 'A0003' AND cg_cat.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg_cat.status IS NULL OR cg_cat.status = 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = 'A0003' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT cs.calendar_schedule_seq AS calendarScheduleSeq, cs.event_kind AS eventKind, cs.title, cs.category_code AS categoryCode, cs.event_color AS eventColor, cd_cat.code_name AS categoryName, cs.content, DATE_FORMAT(cs.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(cs.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, TIME_FORMAT(cs.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(cs.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, cs.birth_month AS birthMonth, cs.birth_day AS birthDay, cs.create_id AS createId, DATE_FORMAT(cs.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(cs.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM calendar_schedule cs
WHERE cs.use_yn = 'Y' AND cs.event_kind = 'GENERAL' AND cs.start_date IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_date IS NOT NULL AND cs.start_date <= #{to} AND cs.end_date >= #{from} ORDER BY cs.start_date ASC, cs.calendar_schedule_seq ASC

SELECT cs.calendar_schedule_seq AS calendarScheduleSeq, cs.event_kind AS eventKind, cs.title, cs.category_code AS categoryCode, cs.event_color AS eventColor, cd_cat.code_name AS categoryName, cs.content, DATE_FORMAT(cs.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(cs.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, TIME_FORMAT(cs.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(cs.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, cs.birth_month AS birthMonth, cs.birth_day AS birthDay, cs.create_id AS createId, DATE_FORMAT(cs.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(cs.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM calendar_schedule cs
WHERE cs.use_yn = 'Y' AND cs.event_kind = 'BIRTHDAY' AND cs.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND cs.birth_day IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cs.birth_month ASC, cs.birth_day ASC, cs.calendar_schedule_seq ASC

SELECT cs.calendar_schedule_seq AS calendarScheduleSeq, cs.event_kind AS eventKind, cs.title, cs.category_code AS categoryCode, cs.event_color AS eventColor, cd_cat.code_name AS categoryName, cs.content, DATE_FORMAT(cs.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(cs.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, TIME_FORMAT(cs.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(cs.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, cs.birth_month AS birthMonth, cs.birth_day AS birthDay, cs.create_id AS createId, DATE_FORMAT(cs.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(cs.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM calendar_schedule cs
WHERE cs.calendar_schedule_seq = #{calendarScheduleSeq} AND cs.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_schedule ( event_kind, title, category_code, event_color, content, start_date, end_date, start_time, end_time, birth_month, birth_day, use_yn, create_id, create_ip, create_dt, modify_id, modify_ip, modify_dt ) VALUES ( #{eventKind}, #{title}, #{categoryCode}, #{eventColor}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{birthMonth}, #{birthDay}, 'Y', #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE calendar_schedule SET event_kind = #{eventKind}, title = #{title}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, event_color = #{eventColor}, content = #{content}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, birth_month = #{birthMonth}, birth_day = #{birthDay}, modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE calendar_schedule_seq = #{calendarScheduleSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE calendar_schedule SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE calendar_schedule_seq = #{calendarScheduleSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
